description_long: This is a heavy-duty pick hammer featuring a long, straight wooden handle and a robust, double-ended forged steel head. The head has two distinct ends: one is a pointed pick, ideal for breaking hard surfaces, while the other is a flat chisel, suitable for prying or splitting. The handle is smooth, cylindrical, and appears to be made of light-colored wood, providing a comfortable grip for two-handed use. The head is securely attached to the handle with a reinforced collar, ensuring durability during repeated impacts. The tool is marked with the brand 'DYNAMICST' on the upper part of the handle. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A sturdy pick hammer with a wooden handle and a black, double-ended steel head featuring a pointed pick and a flat chisel. The tool is clean, branded, and built for heavy-duty urban tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the black steel head, with both the pointed pick and flat chisel ends visible, and the 'DYNAMICST' branding on the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the head and the straight alignment of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the head's full width and both functional ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile of the head and the handle's attachment point.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, smooth, cylindrical, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: double-ended pickaxe head with one pointed pick end and one flat chisel end, forged steel
